location.name: Art appraisers in Indianapolis, Indiana
location.description: Compare art appraisers in Indianapolis, Indiana.

listedAppraisers.name: Anderson Fine Art Appraisals (AFAA)
listedAppraisers.description: Anderson Fine Art Appraisals (AFAA) provides professional art appraisal services specializing in European art, American art, Contemporary, Modern, Impressionist, 19th-century works, Expert Witness. With Decades experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: AppraiseitNow
listedAppraisers.description: AppraiseitNow provides professional art appraisal services specializing in general personal property, art appraisals, online evaluations. With Established business experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: Art of Estates
listedAppraisers.description: Art of Estates appraisal firm provides unbiased appraisals for Fine Art, Antiques, silver, glass, pottery, and historic artifacts. Based in Indianapolis, Indiana, with expertise serving attorneys, insurance companies, and estate planners.

listedAppraisers.name: Art of Estates - Art Appraisal & Consulting
listedAppraisers.description: Art of Estates is a nationwide, privately-held, personal property consulting and confidential appraisal company that helps clients identify, evaluate and sometimes transition assets towards the best possible outcome.

listedAppraisers.name: Brady Dreasher - Art of Estates
listedAppraisers.description: Brady Dreasher is a principal appraiser at Art of Estates in Indianapolis, providing expert fine art, antique, and personal property appraisals. Listed as a recommended appraiser by the Indiana Historical Society.

listedAppraisers.name: Circle City Art Appraisals
listedAppraisers.description: Circle City Art Appraisals provides expert fine art and Indiana regional art appraisals for collectors, galleries, and institutions throughout the Indianapolis metropolitan area.

listedAppraisers.name: Duwamps Fine Art & Antique Appraisals
listedAppraisers.description: Duwamps Fine Art & Antique Appraisals offers fine art appraisal services serving Indianapolis, IN. Contact the business directly to confirm current service area, qualifications, fees, report type, and scheduling before engagement.

listedAppraisers.name: Escher Associates (EA)
listedAppraisers.description: Escher Associates (EA) provides professional art appraisal services specializing in Paintings, Sculpture, Photography, Rare books. With Founded in 1984 experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: Gurr Johns
listedAppraisers.description: Gurr Johns provides professional art appraisal services specializing in high-value appraisals, expert witness services. With Established business experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: Hoosier Art Advisors
